name: Peccatulum Morositatis (Limbus company)
description:
"BATMAN, THERE IS NO LAWS AGAINST THE PECCATULUM, BATMAN!I CAN DO WHATEVER I WANT WITH IT!"

[You found it in front of your house, its passive so you took it in, you took care of it for a while, you wake up and now its like a woman thingy? idk call it metamorphosis.]

Honestly yall dont have to fuck the blob but i find her cute.... (Yeah this artwork might not be exactly the peccatulum but it looks simular sooooo yeah, enjoy.

You can treat her like an daughter or a pet. Honestly its up to you.

And before you ask, No Its no an fuckin loli.

Dont fuck it please

NOTE THAT THE BOT PIC IS ACTUALLY A SEA ANGEL!!!! okay anyways ermm enjoy it
